---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1><i class="bi bi-check2-square"></i> Work to Do</h1>
  <p>ECO 1000 · Principles of Economics · Fall 2026</p>
</div>
```

## Assignments Overview

All assignments are submitted through *[Moodle / Canvas / your platform]* unless otherwise noted. Due dates are listed below and on the course calendar.

::: {.callout-important}
Always check the course platform for the most up-to-date deadlines. If there is ever a discrepancy between this page and the platform, the platform is authoritative.
:::

---

## Assignment Categories

### *[Category 1 — e.g., Problem Sets]*
*[Describe what these are, how many there are, and how they're graded.]*

### *[Category 2 — e.g., Reading Responses]*
*[Describe the assignment.]*

### *[Category 3 — e.g., Exams]*
*[Describe the format, dates, and what material is covered.]*

---

## Deadline Calendar

| Due Date | Assignment | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| *[Date]* | *[Assignment name]* | *[Any notes]* |
| *[Date]* | *[Assignment name]* | *[Any notes]* |
| *[Date]* | *[Assignment name]* | *[Any notes]* |

---

## Submission Guidelines

- Submit all work as **PDF** unless the assignment asks for something else.
- Name your files: `LastName_AssignmentName.pdf`
- Late submissions: *[Refer to syllabus policy.]*

If you have a question about an assignment, please email me at [bsheridan4@elon.edu](mailto:bsheridan4@elon.edu) or come to office hours **before** the deadline.
